title: Strixun: Trials of the Wild
description: Hardcore survival modpack with ~300  exploration, magic, combat, and world‑overhaul mods. Includes Rituals for totem magic, buffs, farming, and defenses, plus Compressy for massive block storage. Optional no‑regen/no‑raids for true hardcore players.
body:
# Strixun: Trials of the Wild – A Curated Long‑Form Progression Modpack  
> ℹ️ A hardcore survival and exploration modpack with **~250 carefully curated mods**, featuring my own creations — **Rituals**, a mystical totem‑magic system, and **Compressy**, a near‑infinite storage solution — woven naturally into long‑form progression, dangerous worldgen, and a world that pushes back.

## Overview

![~](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/136bfc572d5b03b14f12016255bf5021f0989789.png)

Pack A is a **progression‑focused kitchen‑sink modpack** with **~250 curated mods**, built for immersive adventuring, long‑form progression, and high replayability. It blends exploration, multiple skill systems (including **SimpleSkills**), and deeply tuned world generation with a tiered resource path that starts at wood and climbs through stone, copper, iron, and beyond. Every milestone feels earned, and every biome has a story to tell. ^_^

Alongside the community’s best mods, this pack includes **two custom mods I built specifically to enhance this experience**:

### [![Rituals](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/totem-rituals?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=🔮)](https://modrinth.com/mod/totem-rituals)   Rituals — Totem Magic for Survival, Buffs & Automation
A mystical, lore‑friendly system that adds magical totems, area buffs, automated defenses, farming tools, and multi‑totem pattern rituals.  
It’s powerful, but intentionally balanced — a toolset that rewards planning without trivializing survival.

### [![Compressy](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/compressy?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=📦)](https://modrinth.com/mod/compressy) Compressy — Extreme Storage Without Tech Progression  
Compress any block up to 32 tiers using standard crafting recipes.  
Perfect for long mining trips, megabuilds, and keeping inventories clean without introducing late‑game tech shortcuts.

Both mods are designed to **support** the pack’s progression, not dominate it — they feel like natural extensions of the world.

The intended playstyle is **hardcore‑leaning**: disabling raids and natural health regeneration is *recommended* for the full experience (campfires are your friend), Ironman mode is enabled in **SimpleSkills**, and the world is designed to push back. Server usage compatible, see changelog notes for mods to exclude from server (client-only stuff). ;)

---

## 🌦️ Seasons, Survival & Environmental Hazards  
Plan ahead: seasons shift, temperatures fluctuate, and biomes present unique environmental challenges.

[![Serene Seasons](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/serene-seasons?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=Serene%20Seasons)](https://modrinth.com/mod/serene-seasons)
[![SeasonHUD](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/seasonhud?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=SeasonHUD)](https://modrinth.com/mod/seasonhud)
[![Custom Time Cycle](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/customtimecycle?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=Custom%20Time%20Cycle)](https://modrinth.com/mod/customtimecycle)

Stay warm, stay fed, stay alive. o_o

---

## 📘 Track Everything  
Keep track of… *EVERYTHING* with the included companion mod:

[![Completionist’s Index](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/completionists-index?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=Completionist%27s%20Index)](https://modrinth.com/mod/completionists-index)

## 📦 Storage, Logistics & Automation  
Carry all the things using:

[![Metal Bundles](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/metal-bundles?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=Metal%20Bundles)](https://modrinth.com/mod/metal-bundles)
[![Extended Drawers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/extended-drawers?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=Extended%20Drawers)](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers)
[![Tom’s Simple Storage](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/toms-storage?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=Tom%27s%20Simple%20Storage)](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)
[![Storage Delight](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/storage-delight?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=Storage%20Delight)](https://modrinth.com/mod/storage-delight)
[![Classic Pipes](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/classic-pipes?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=Classic%20Pipes)](https://modrinth.com/mod/classic-pipes)
[![Compressy](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/compressy?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=📦Compressy)](https://modrinth.com/mod/compressy)

Press **Y** while hovering an item to highlight it in nearby storage.  
Storage inception is real. :P

**Compressy**, my own storage mod, lets you compress any block up to ridiculous levels using standard crafting recipes — perfect for long mining sessions and megabuilds without introducing late‑game tech shortcuts.

Automation options include:

[![Rituals](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/totem-rituals?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=🔮Rituals)](https://modrinth.com/mod/totem-rituals)
[![Create Fly](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/create-fly?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=Create%20Fly)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fly)
[![Tool Trims](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/tool-trims?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=Tool%20Trims)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tool-trims)
[![Enchantments Encore](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/enchantments-encore?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=Enchantments%20Encore)](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantments-encore)
[![Enchants & Expeditions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/enchants-and-expeditions?style=for-the-badge&color=e59847&label=Enchants%20%26%20Expeditions)](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchants-and-expeditions)

**Rituals**, my totem‑based datapack/mod, adds magical totems that can handle things like area buffs, base defense, growth, and multi‑totem patterns for more advanced setups — useful tools that still respect the survival challenge.

## Notes  
- Some mods may be unstable depending on your system; feel free to disable any that cause issues  
- This collection is a compilation of independent works; no joint authorship or endorsement is implied
